---
title: "Venn Diagram"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
---


```{python}
import os
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from itertools import combinations
from itables import show
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

from utils import compute_gene_sets, plot_venn_from_sets, genes_to_Ncol_df
```

```{python}
model = "condition"

padj_threshold = 0.05
FC = 1.5
```


```{python}
folder = "../results/contrasts/"
list_df = []
for file in os.listdir(folder):
    if model in file:
        df = pd.read_csv(f'{folder}/{file}',sep=';')
        file_name = file[:-4]
        split = file_name.split("_")
        contrast = "_".join(split[1:])
        df['contrast'] = contrast
        df['model'] = model
        list_df+=[df]
```


```{python}
concat = pd.concat(list_df)
contrast_list = concat['contrast'].unique().tolist()
```

## All Contrasts

### Venn Plot with intersect genes
- P-adjusted (Padj) threshold: `{python} padj_threshold`
- Fold Change (FC) threshold (absolute values): `{python} FC`
```{python}
#| layout-ncol: 2
#| column: page
#| fig-cap: Venn
#| tbl-cap: table Caption
mode = 'abs'
de, gene_sets = compute_gene_sets(
    concat,
    contrasts=contrast_list,
    mode=mode,
    gene_col="gene_name",
    FC=FC
)
title = f"DE genes ({mode})\npadj<{padj_threshold}, FC>{FC}"

plot_venn_from_sets(
    gene_sets,
    title=title
)
intersection = set.intersection(*gene_sets.values())
show(genes_to_Ncol_df(intersection,n_cols=8),searching=False,pageLength=15,caption=f'genes intersection (N={len(intersection)})') 
```

### Dataframe fo all DEGs

```{python}
#| column: page
show(de)
```


## Pairwise compareason

### All DEGs (absolute FC)
```{python}
def get_pairwise_contrasts(contrast_list):
    return list(combinations(contrast_list, 2))

pairs = get_pairwise_contrasts(contrast_list)
```
```{python}
#| panel: tabset
#| column: screen-inset
#| output: asis
for pair in pairs:
    print(f"## {pair}") # Tab title
    print("::: {layout-ncol=2}\n")
    de, gene_sets = compute_gene_sets(
        concat,
        contrasts=pair,
        mode='abs',
        gene_col="gene_name",
        FC=FC
    )
    title = f"DE genes ({mode})\npadj<{padj_threshold}, |FC|>{FC}"

    plot_venn_from_sets(
        gene_sets,
        title=title,
    )
    intersection = set.intersection(*gene_sets.values())
    df = genes_to_Ncol_df(intersection,n_cols=8)
    show(df,searching=False,pageLength=15,caption=f'genes intersection (N={len(intersection)})')
    show(de)
    print(f":::\n")
```

### Up regulated genes
```{python}
def get_pairwise_contrasts(contrast_list):
    return list(combinations(contrast_list, 2))

pairs = get_pairwise_contrasts(contrast_list)
```
```{python}
#| panel: tabset
#| column: screen-inset
#| output: asis
for pair in pairs:
    print(f"## {pair}") # Tab title
    print("::: {layout-ncol=2}\n")
    mode = 'up'
    de, gene_sets = compute_gene_sets(
        concat,
        contrasts=pair,
        mode=mode,
        gene_col="gene_name",
        FC=FC
    )
    title = f"DE genes ({mode})\npadj<{padj_threshold}, FC>{FC}"

    plot_venn_from_sets(
        gene_sets,
        title=title,
    )
    intersection = set.intersection(*gene_sets.values())
    df = genes_to_Ncol_df(intersection,n_cols=8)
    show(df,searching=False,pageLength=15,caption=f'genes intersection (N={len(intersection)})')
    show(de)
    print(f":::\n")
```

### Down regulated genes
```{python}
def get_pairwise_contrasts(contrast_list):
    return list(combinations(contrast_list, 2))

pairs = get_pairwise_contrasts(contrast_list)
```
```{python}
#| panel: tabset
#| column: screen-inset
#| output: asis
for pair in pairs:
    print(f"## {pair}") # Tab title
    print("::: {layout-ncol=2}\n")
    mode = 'down'
    de, gene_sets = compute_gene_sets(
        concat,
        contrasts=pair,
        mode=mode,
        gene_col="gene_name",
        FC=FC
    )
    title = f"DE genes ({mode})\npadj<{padj_threshold}, FC<{FC}"

    plot_venn_from_sets(
        gene_sets,
        title=title,
    )
    intersection = set.intersection(*gene_sets.values())
    df = genes_to_Ncol_df(intersection,n_cols=8)
    show(df,searching=False,pageLength=15,caption=f'genes intersection (N={len(intersection)})')
    show(de)
    print(f":::\n")
```
